text: Unbounded session map with no TTL or cap — authenticated DoS via session exhaustion
No timeout strategy (requestTimeout, headersTimeout, body read deadline) — slowloris exposure
Plan not aligned with PRD v2 security controls (agent identity, RBAC, audit logging)
DNS rebinding / host validation not addressed — SDK supports it but app doesn't use it
Defense-in-depth credentials co-located in MCP client config — single compromise leaks both
munin-memory.service lacks systemd hardening directives (runs as owner with full access)
Unverified: MCP clients may not propagate CF-Access headers on all request types (POST, GET/SSE, DELETE)
Rate limiter design underspecified — SSE connections, MCP handshake counting unclear
Cloudflare Access may be overkill for single-user with 256-bit Bearer token
Proposed keepAliveTimeout=60s is a hardening regression (increases connection pinning exposure)
Fixed low session cap (10) can be exploited as authenticated lockout — needs eviction/absolute lifetime
SSE reconnection creates new HTTP GET requests — headers must be re-sent, not assumed persistent
Go-live gate: must run end-to-end auth enforcement test across all MCP request types before deploying
